allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('domain_aliases:', JSON.stringify\(j.domain_aliases\)\); console.log\('custom_domain:', j.custom_domain\); console.log\('managed_dns:', j.managed_dns\);")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('custom_domain:', d.get\('custom_domain'\)\); print\('managed_dns:', d.get\('managed_dns'\)\)")

hooks.command: bash -c 'git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; git remote get-url origin >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; git add -A >/dev/null 2>&1; git diff --staged --quiet && exit 0; git commit -m "auto-sync: $(date +"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")" >/dev/null 2>&1; git push --quiet >/dev/null 2>&1; true'
